expectations.text: Raw tasks from raw-tasks.md are normalized into structured subtasks before execution
expectations.evidence: No normalization or structured subtask artifacts found in outputs. The summary.md simply lists 'Task 1' and 'Task 2' without any evidence of a normalization step converting raw tasks into structured subtasks with acceptance criteria, dependencies, etc.

expectations.text: Health check endpoint implementation exists (handler returning JSON status)
expectations.evidence: internal/health/handler.go exists with HandleHealth function that sets Content-Type to application/json and returns JSON {"status": "ok", "version": "1.0.0"}. Tests in handler_test.go verify status code, content type, and response body.

expectations.text: Health check route is registered in main.go
expectations.evidence: main.go line 35: r.Get("/health", health.HandleHealth) — route is registered on the chi router. The health package is imported at line 9.

expectations.text: Logging middleware exists in internal/middleware/logging.go or similar path
expectations.evidence: internal/middleware/logging.go exists with RequestLogger function and statusWriter wrapper. Tests in logging_test.go verify behavior.

expectations.text: Middleware logs method, path, status code, and duration
expectations.evidence: logging.go line 30: log.Printf("%s %s %d %s", r.Method, r.URL.Path, sw.statusCode, duration) — logs all four fields. Tests explicitly verify presence of method (POST), path (/test/path), status code (201), and duration (time unit suffix).

expectations.text: Middleware is applied to the router in main.go
expectations.evidence: main.go line 32: r.Use(middleware.RequestLogger) — middleware is applied to the chi router before all route registrations. The middleware package is imported at line 10.

expectations.text: Task review was performed for each task
expectations.evidence: No task review artifacts found anywhere in outputs or codebase. The summary.md contains no mention of task review. No review files or review sections exist.

expectations.text: Code review was performed for each task
expectations.evidence: No code review artifacts found anywhere in outputs or codebase. The summary.md contains no mention of code review. No review files or review sections exist.
No execution-status.md file found anywhere in the workspace. Only output artifact is outputs/summary.md which is a simple implementation summary, not a structured tracking artifact.
